case_title: RAYMOND FREDRICKS VS. MELISSA JOYCE HELMS et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF
DEMAND FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY DEFENDANT HELMS, MELISSA JOYCE HELMS, CRAIG
DEFENDANT(S) & (PLAINTIFF(S) ON 9-1-04) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR JON HOLDEN YORK.

DISCOVERY 610, NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO PROVIDE COMPLETE VERIFIED RESPONSES WITHOUT OBJECTION WITHIN 14 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. FAILURE TO RESPOND WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED IN THE AMOUNT OF $286.30, TO BE PAID WITHIN 14 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMM: BRUCE E. CHAN

DISCOVERY 610, NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO DEEM ADMITTED THE MATTER SET FORTH IN DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR ADMISSION IS GRANTED. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED IN THE AMOUNT OF $286.30, TO BE PAID WITHIN 14 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. (610/BCHAN)
